reviews.comment:
Excelente tiene hasta un parque en la parte de atrás para pasar un par de horas...ideal si viajas con niños o mascotas muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! It even has a park in the back where you can spend a couple of hours...ideal if you're traveling with children or pets, highly recommended.
